title: A class has too high a cyclomatic complexity
description: High cyclomatic complexity could indicate a large, difficult to understand and maintain class.
message: Class has too high cyclomatic complexity.
recommendation: Consider breaking down the class into smaller, more manageable parts.

noncompliant.description: Class with multiple conditional branches and loops.

compliant.description: Class with simple structure and no conditional branches or loops.

why_is_this_an_issue: High cyclomatic complexity could indicate a large, difficult to understand and maintain class which could lead to bugs and security vulnerabilities.
how_to_fix: Consider breaking down the class into smaller, more manageable parts.
